diagrams.title: Pixel Grid Representation
diagrams.description: Shows how a continuous image is discretized into rows and columns of pixels with coordinates
diagrams.purpose: Understanding spatial discretization and pixel addressing

diagrams.title: Sampling Effect Comparison
diagrams.description: Comparison of same image at different sampling rates showing 256×256, 128×128, 64×64 resolutions
diagrams.purpose: Visualizing impact of sampling on image quality and resolution

diagrams.title: Quantization Levels Comparison
diagrams.description: Same image with 256, 64, 16, and 4 gray levels showing banding effect
diagrams.purpose: Understanding how quantization levels affect image detail and quality

diagrams.title: Pixel Neighborhoods
diagrams.purpose: Learning pixel connectivity concepts for image analysis

diagrams.title: RGB Color Cube
diagrams.description: 3D representation of RGB color space showing primary, secondary colors and white/black corners
diagrams.purpose: Understanding additive color mixing and RGB representation

diagrams.title: Image Histogram Examples
diagrams.description: Different histogram shapes: dark image, bright image, low contrast, high contrast
diagrams.purpose: Interpreting histogram for image analysis and enhancement
